meaning: adj.恐怖的,可怕的,令人毛骨悚然的
examples: Everybody was talking, and intent upon the grisly spectacle before them.
Why did I not marry King Grisly-beard?
The king got the nickname of Grisly-beard.
Tate acknowledged that Manson holds a prominent -- and grisly -- place among mass murderers.
Her long legal battle with her stepmother unearthed her grisly struggle with her father.
